summary: Soundboard Set 2 delivers A‑plus Jerry vocals and a standout Playing In The Band, solid Truckin', plus a beautiful Broken Down despite an abrupt cut.
review: The set showcases a killer Playing In The Band that the reviewer would pick over Dark Star, a solid Truckin' and a beautifully performed Broken Down even though it ends with a needle‑pulling glitch. Jerry’s vocals are praised as A+, and the overall vibe of the setlist is described as “pretty cool.” Recording quality isn’t specifically critiqued beyond the cut on Broken Down, suggesting a generally good soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Single detailed 5‑star review highlights strong musical performance and decent recording; limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit sound quality complaints except an abrupt cut ending on Broken Down, implying a generally clean board capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Cool setlist; reviewer prefers Playing In The Band over Dark Star and notes the set’s overall strength.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Vocals rated A+ throughout the set.
